author: xuquan-nikkkki
description: Splits folder and file lists into separate views, simplifying navigation, improving clarity, and making it more intuitive to organize your notes

manifest.author: Xu Quan
manifest.description: Splits folder and file lists into separate views, simplifying navigation, improving clarity, and making it more intuitive to organize your notes.
manifest.name: FolderFile Splitter

name: FolderFile Splitter

releases.author: XuQuan-nikkkki
releases.description:
### 🐞 Fixes

- Fixed an issue where folders could not be renamed.
- Fixed sorting so that folders/files/tags now follow natural order (e.g. 2 comes before 10).
- Fixed a bug where toggling “Strip markdown syntax” or “Remove heading” did not immediately refresh file previews.

### ⚙️ New Settings
- Option to customize the number of preview lines shown in the file list.
- Option to show or hide the view mode indicator above the file list.

releases.author: XuQuan-nikkkki
releases.description:
### ✨ Highlights

* **Major code refactor**
- Much of the plugin has been refactored to reduce duplication and improve maintainability, especially with the introduction of tag management. This is also why this update took longer than usual — thanks for your patience!

### 🔍 New Features

* **Basic search support**
  * Search by file title.
  * Automatically focuses the current folder or tag during search.
* **Tag selection toggle**
  * You can now select and deselect tag sections to filter or reset the file list.
* **File preview caching**

  * File content previews are now cached, significantly improving performance when switching folders or tags with many files.

### ⚙️ New Settings

* **Show file count** in folder/tag sections.
* **Deduplicate tag files**
  * Useful when a file has multiple sibling tags (e.g. `A/b1` and `A/b2`) and appears more than once.
* **Click behavior for expanding folders/tags**
  * Choose between:
    * Single-click to select + expand (like Obsidian’s native explorer)
    * Only expand via toggle icon
    * First click to select, second click to expand

### 🐞 Fixes
* File list now correctly updates when renaming files or editing tags in the file editor.

---

### 🛠 Coming Soon
* Search inside file contents
* Add/remove files under tags
* Wildcard-based file hiding
* Keyboard shortcut support

releases.author: XuQuan-nikkkki
releases.description:
### ✨ Features
- Tag list support
  - Now displays all tags in a collapsible list.
  - Tags can be pinned, sorted, and renamed.
  - Custom tag sorting and drag-and-drop to change hierarchy will be supported in future versions.
- Reveal active file in explorer
  - Added a setting to toggle whether the explorer auto-reveals the active file.

### 🧩 Enhancements
- Added hover tooltips (ARIA labels) for folders, tags, files, and action buttons — improving accessibility and usability.

releases.author: XuQuan-nikkkki
releases.description:
### 🐞 Fixes
- Fixed an issue where, with `Expand folder on click` set to `toggle icon`, clicking on the folder name could no longer select it.

releases.author: XuQuan-nikkkki
releases.description:
### ✨ Improvements
- Added icons to context menu items.
- Option to remove Markdown formatting in file preview.
- Option to hide the first heading line in file preview.
- Option to toggle bold style for file titles.
- Improved collapse button logic: now shown whenever any folder is expanded.

### 🐞 Fixes
- Fixed an issue where errors for missing folder notes would appear repeatedly — now shown only once.
- Fixed a bug where switching active files could unexpectedly open the file.

releases.author: XuQuan-nikkkki
releases.description:
## ✨ Features
### Folder note support
- Option to treat a note as the content of a folder.
- Supports auto-opening, custom location, and behavior when missing.
### Show file creation date
- Display creation dates in the file list with customizable format.

### Other
- Improved setting categories for better clarity.
- Shortened the plugin display name.

## 🐞 Bug Fixes
- Set a minimum width for the file list to avoid layout issues.
- Disabled rename, delete, and move actions for the root folder.
- Fixed persistent error after rename failures.

releases.author: XuQuan-nikkkki
releases.description:
### ✨ Enhancements
- **Improved navigation**: When switching the active file, the file manager now automatically scrolls to and focuses on the current file.
- **Improved creation flow**: When creating a new folder or file, the newly created item is automatically focused and enters rename mode.

### 🎨 Styling & Theme Support
- **Stable class names**: All element class names have been refactored to be consistent and stable, making it easier to apply custom CSS snippets.
- **Full theme compatibility**: The plugin now fully adopts Obsidian’s native class naming conventions and styling, ensuring seamless integration with your theme.
![theme_adpation](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/cc93df4b-0ff0-4664-8bd1-e68dadf7f3f8)


### 🛠 New Settings
- Option to hide the root folder.
- Option to adjust spacing between files in the file list.
- Option to toggle dividers between file items.
- Option to highlight the action button bar for better visual separation.
- Option to auto-hide the action button bar, showing it only on hover.
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8f36208c-76ce-4a19-a8ea-957f0c66f332)

### 🐞 Bug Fixes
- Fixed an issue where the file list did not scroll to the bottom correctly in vertical split layout.

releases.author: XuQuan-nikkkki
releases.description:
### ✨ New Features
- **Layout Mode Toggle**: Support for switching between horizontal (folders above files) and vertical (folders beside files) split views.
- **New Settings Options**:
    - Option to open the destination folder automatically after moving a file or folder.
    - Option to show files from subfolders in the file list.

### 🛠 Improvements
- **Refactored Drag-and-Drop**: Redesigned the drag-and-drop logic to avoid conflicts with Obsidian’s native behavior, and fixed the issue where images couldn’t be dragged into the editor from the native file manager.
- **Settings UI Enhancements**:
    - Settings are now grouped for better organization.
    - Configuration labels and tooltips are localized for Chinese users.

releases.author: XuQuan-nikkkki
releases.description:
### 🐞 Bug Fixes
- Updated the implementation of renaming folders/files to fix an issue where incomplete pinyin was mistakenly recorded when canceling Chinese input.
- Fixed an issue where custom folder sorting was not correctly saved.
- Fixed an issue where files inside newly created folders could not be custom sorted.
- Fixed an issue where pinned folders/files lost their pinned status after renaming.
- Optimized the update logic for pinned and custom sorting states after creating, deleting, moving, or copying folders.

releases.author: XuQuan-nikkkki
releases.description:
### ✨ New Features
- Added interaction to collapse/expand the folder column.
- Added support for displaying file types.

### 🐞 Bug Fixes
- Fixed an issue where the list view remained in a loading state after an error occurred during the upgrade process.

releases.author: XuQuan-nikkkki
releases.description:
### ✨ New Features
- Added customizable sorting for files and folders.
- Introduced the ability to pin files and folders to the top for quick access.
- Improved theme adaptation for seamless integration with your Obsidian theme.
- Added a quick file open shortcut using the Cmd/Ctrl key for faster navigation.

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- Fixed a styling issue where text was hard to read in dark mode.
- Fixed a bug preventing Chinese input during renaming.

releases.author: XuQuan-nikkkki
releases.description:
### ✨ New Features
- Added an option to choose whether to focus on the plugin view on startup.
- Added an option to show or hide file details, including creation time and content preview.
### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- Fixed a styling issue where text was hard to read in dark mode.

releases.author: XuQuan-nikkkki
releases.description: The initial release of the FolderFile Splitter plugin, featuring a split view to separate folders and files for improved navigation and organization.
